title: 1981-04-16_Pat_61.txt
key_claims: The "meta-abstraction" drops the conceptual error of causation, revealing a unified spatial field where objects don't physically strike one another but operate via "mutual notification" (pre-programmed, synchronized cooperation).
Without efficient cause pushing from the past, Aristotle's "final cause" is seen pulling from the future. VALIS is recognized as a perturbation acting on the present from the future.

Dick revises his theory of the adventitious psyche: "Thomas" was not an archaic mind from the past, but Dick's own *perfected future self* moving retrograde in time to save him from death (the Xerox missive).
The 1974 experience is fundamentally about the future breaking into the present, accelerating his change-rate velocity and bringing an abstract, structural, informational view of the universe.
recurring_concepts: **Tachyonic/Retrograde Time**: The realization that the salvation mechanism (VALIS) operates backward from the Omega Point or End of Time to rescue the present.
**The Reality Field**: The concept that space is a singular matrix of information rather than a void filled with distinct colliding bodies.
reading_excerpt: The "meta-abstraction" drops the conceptual error of causation, revealing a unified spatial field where objects don't physically strike one another but operate via "mutual notification" (pre-programmed, synchronized cooperation).
